intro:
There is no information available on Ionoxalis vespertilionis. However, I can provide information on Ionoxalis, a genus of flowering plants in the family Boraginaceae.

Ionolepis, Ione, and sometimes Ionoxalis are used to refer to this genus. However, the correct botanical name for this plant is Ionolepis or Ione. If you are referring to Ionolepis, I will provide information on this plant.

If you are referring to Ione, then this plant is a flowering plant that produces purple flowers and is native to the western United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of Ione include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids. The most common herbal preparations made with Ione include teas, infusions, and tinctures.
